name: PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk
summary: PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk primarily engages in the real estate business in Indonesia. The company operates through Real Estate, Property, Hotel, and Information Technology segments. It offers houses, shop houses, condominiums, apartments, office buildings, shopping centers, and other buildings, as well as land; and rents real estate properties. It also operates hotels and a recreation arena; and provides information technology services. PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk.
